/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/game_engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/entity.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/world.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/turret.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/pepe.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/actionbar.cc.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/button.cc.o -o game  -lsfml-network -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system
